chapter_title.en: The Limits of Ablution, Its Order and Reward

text: 98 - وَ سُئِلَ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ خُفُّهُ مُخَرَّقاً فَيُدْخِلُ يَدَهُ وَ يَمْسَحُ ظَهْرَ قَدَمَيْهِ أَ يُجْزِيهِ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.98 - Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) was asked about a man whose leather socks (khuffs) are torn, and he puts his hand in and wipes over the tops of his feet. Is this sufficient?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
